title: Sanusi calls for national AI strategy for Nigeria
description: The 16th Emir of Kano, Muhammadu Sanusi II, has said Nigeria urgently needs a clear national plan and policy framework to guide the use of new technologies, especially artificial intelligence (AI), for development. He spoke at a conference of pro-chancellors of state-owned universities held in Kano, themed “Unlocking the Potentials of Artificial Intelligence: University Governance, [...] Sanusi calls for national AI strategy for Nigeria

title: Gen Z faces rising job fears as former Meta executive launches AI skills nonprofit
description: Former Meta executive launches nonprofit to help Gen Z gain AI skills as fears grow over automation and job security.
